title: Pakistan congratulates “True Friend” Xi Jinping on securing third term in historic election
description: Islamabad [Pakistan], October 23 (ANI): Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Sunday extended his wishes to Xi Jinping after he clinched the third term in a...
